title: Inside text-search — the Elasticsearch-backed search service
subtitle: Purpose: full-text search over users / organizations / workspaces — the only IDP service backed by Elasticsearch. box = component · arrow = uses / calls. For the index↔query flow see the Dynamic view.

Search Handler / Indexer → Elasticsearch Client → Elasticsearch
Index is derived / rebuildable — Mongo `main` is the source of truth (re-index to restore)
